hero.title: Fajr Jeju
hero.subtitle: Supporting the Muslim community in Jeju — from the first musalla in southern Jeju to connecting brothers and sisters across the island.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.title: A home for every Muslim in Jeju
mission.desc: Hundreds of Muslim workers and families live across Jeju Island, many far from the only mosque in Jeju City. Fajr Jeju exists to bridge that gap.
mission.musallaDesc: A dedicated prayer space in Pyoseon, southern Jeju — 58.9m², Qibla-aligned, open to all. Sisters' area, 2 restrooms (1 for wudu), small kitchen.

fund.label: Pyoseon Musalla Fund
fund.title: Help us open the musalla
fund.desc: Every donation goes directly to securing and setting up the Pyoseon musalla space.

notices.title: Announcements
notices.placeholder1: Musalla opening schedule will be announced soon
notices.placeholder3: Donation ledger updated with latest transactions

footer.org: Fajr Jeju — Non-profit Muslim community organization in Jeju Island, South Korea
